Applying to 00101100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 6 = 0
1 I 7 = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 I 0 = 0
6 I 1 = 0
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{00000001}
